pattern: A linear pass that flips a sign with each index, adding at even positions and subtracting at odd ones.
hints: The sign attached to an element depends only on whether its index is even or odd.
You can track a multiplier that alternates between plus one and minus one as you advance.
Iterate with the index; add the element when the index is even and subtract it when the index is odd, accumulating the running total.

edge_inputs.description: even length can give a negative result
odd length tail keeps an extra positive term

stress.description: 100 random values to exercise the alternation
